prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: LST-CHRISTMAS-TRAIN-003
Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET
Brand (from catalog): DirectSaleUSA
Existing Title: KidFun 1:48 Large Scale Kids Toy Train Set with Lights Sounds Real Smoke, Black
Description: The 20 Piece Deluxe Christmas Train Set is a great addition to any kid's toy vehicle collection. Ideal for under the Christmas tree during the holiday season, this set is bound to leave your child with hours of endless fun and will make your house look especially festive.
Search Terms: train set toys Christmas decorations Christmas tree Christmas decor Christmas train sets for under the tree Christmas train Christmas tree train holiday decor kids learning and education toys unique gifts DIY projects
Features:
- LARGE SCALE TOY TRAIN SET: If your little ones like trains, they'll love this large scale 20 piece train set they can put together with friends family! With real, billowing smoke, fun sounds and lights, the train set is both fun and a great learning tool too!
- REAL WHISTLING TRAIN: The toy train features a real whistling sound coming from the engine compartment, making the toy train set even more fun and interactive as it moves around the tracks
- REAL SMOKE LIGHTS AND MUSIC: The train set is able to move around the track blowing real smoke, alongside working lights and music
- TOY TRAIN SET TRACKS: Each train toy set comes with curved and straight track pieces and creates an oval track; the track pieces easily snap into place and come apart for convenient storage
- FUN LEARNING TOOL: Putting together the toy train set with kids is fun project that allows them to improve on dexterity and coordination, creativity and cognitive problem solving skills

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: DirectSaleUSA 20-Piece Large Scale Black Toy Train Set

openai.item_name: DirectSaleUSA Large Scale Black Toy Train Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Real Smoke And Whistling Sound, Lights And Music, 20 Snap-Together Tracks, Interactive Learning Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Real Smoke, Lights And Music, Whistling Engine, Oval Track Pieces, Christmas Tree Holiday Decor, STEM Learning Fun
